channel.title: Roy Steves
channel.description: Pool industry, ecommerce, AI, and building technology-forward businesses.

item.title: Why Did You Choose Us? Asking in the Right Place
item.description: How Poolaroo embedded a one-tap "why did you choose us?" survey directly in the Shopify order confirmation email — no marketing opt-in required.

item.title: ChatGPT Mistook our Shopify PDP as Out of Stock
item.description: A hidden 'Backordered' status label in our Shopify theme was confusing ChatGPT's product discovery. Here's how I found it and fixed it.
